title: An Act to include teachers from the Springfield Empowerment Zone in the Massachusetts Teachers' Retirement System

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Williams of Springfield, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Bud L. Williams and Alice Hanlon Peisch for legislation to authorize teachers employed by the Springfield Empowerment Zone to become members of the Massachusetts Teachers' Retirement System.  Public Service.
